title: thymus funkii subsp. burilloi
intro: Thymus funkii subsp. burilloi is a subspecies of the Thymus funkii plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the Iberian Peninsula and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Thymus funkii subsp. burilloi is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
